title: Buy - Declined with Pending Bank Charge

actions.value: When an exchange declines payment for any reason, they do not actually take any money from your bank. The pending charge you see will fall away on it's own, typically in about 1-3 banking days. You may ask your banker for more information about it, or simply do nothing, and your balance will be restored automatically.
